data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a 'Queue/routing escalation model' as part of the CRM SLA and Escalation Policy. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of this model. The linked use case mentions the need for this model but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or validation, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Queue/routing escalation model is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of the queue/routing escalation model.
